title: hieracium subcrocatum
intro: Hieracium subcrocatum, a perennial plant species, is a type of hawkweed known for its bright yellow flowers and potential medicinal properties. Traditionally, it has been used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing pain and swelling, as well as its ability to act as an antipyretic to lower fever. Hieracium subcrocatum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use, although its effectiveness and safety may vary depending on the preparation method and individual tolerance.
